privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Petra's privacy policy for visitors using the public used oilfield and industrial equipment brokerage website.
privacy.intro: This policy explains how Petra handles basic information connected to public website inquiries and equipment brokerage conversations.

sections.heading: Information You Provide
sections.body: You may provide contact details, equipment descriptions, location notes, photos, documents, or request details when discussing equipment brokerage, sourcing, or sale opportunities.

sections.heading: How Information Is Used
sections.body: Petra uses submitted information to review equipment opportunities, respond to buyer or seller requests, assess market fit, coordinate brokerage conversations, and improve public website content.

sections.heading: Operational Sharing
sections.body: Equipment details may be shared with relevant buyers, sellers, logistics contacts, or service providers when needed to evaluate or move a potential transaction.

sections.heading: Retention
sections.body: Information may be retained when it supports active brokerage conversations, recordkeeping, business operations, or future equipment sourcing needs.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: Terms for using Petra's public used oilfield and industrial equipment brokerage website.
terms.intro: These terms cover general use of Petra's public website and equipment brokerage information.

sections.heading: Website Use
sections.body: The website is provided for general information about Petra's used oilfield and industrial equipment brokerage work. You agree not to misuse the site or interfere with its operation.

sections.heading: Equipment Information
sections.body: Equipment descriptions, availability, condition, specifications, and regional notes may change. Public website content should not be treated as a final offer, warranty, or transaction document.

sections.heading: Brokerage Conversations
sections.body: Any transaction, sourcing request, sale discussion, inspection, logistics plan, or documentation requirement must be confirmed through direct business communication.

sections.heading: No Guaranteed Outcome
sections.body: Petra may review equipment opportunities and buyer requests, but no sale, purchase, valuation, sourcing result, or timeline is guaranteed through website use.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.description: Cookie policy for Petra's public used oilfield and industrial equipment brokerage website.
cookies.intro: This page explains the basic role cookies and similar browser technologies may play on Petra's public website.

sections.heading: Site Function
sections.body: Cookies or similar storage may support basic website functionality, preferences, security, analytics, or performance measurement.

sections.heading: Analytics and Performance
sections.body: Petra may review aggregated website activity to understand page usage, improve content, and keep public equipment brokerage pages useful.

sections.heading: Browser Controls
sections.body: Most browsers allow you to block, delete, or limit cookies. Some site features may not work as expected if browser storage is disabled.

sections.heading: Policy Updates
sections.body: This policy may be updated as website tools, analytics practices, or public site features change.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.description: Website disclaimer for Petra's used oilfield and industrial equipment brokerage information.
disclaimer.intro: This disclaimer explains the limits of public website information about equipment, brokerage, sourcing, and market context.

sections.heading: General Information
sections.body: Website content is provided for general informational purposes and does not replace direct review, inspection, documentation, or transaction-specific communication.

sections.heading: Equipment Condition
sections.body: Condition, specifications, availability, location, and suitability must be verified before any buyer, seller, or operator relies on an equipment opportunity.

sections.heading: Market Context
sections.body: Market movement, buyer demand, sourcing availability, and regional fit can change quickly. Petra does not guarantee pricing, liquidity, or transaction outcomes based on public content.

sections.heading: Third-Party Details
sections.body: Some equipment information may originate from sellers, operators, yards, or other third parties and must be confirmed before use in a transaction.
